creator: andymenderunix@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
The build process for the QtWebEngine version of Otter fails when trying to use definitions from libdouble-conversion. Installing the devel/double-conversion port provides the shared object I mentioned and allows the build to conclude successfully.

However, now I realized that it might actually be the www/qt5-webengine port that's affected, not the www/otter-browser port. I am checking this now.
